title: AI Thought Experiment Triggers Stock Market Volatility
summary: An AI thought experiment on Substack is causing market concerns, suggesting Wall Street fears AI's growing influence.

title: Kalshi's Prediction Market: Gambling or Societal Good?
summary: Kalshi CEO defends prediction market, arguing it's not gambling but beneficial for society.
charlotte_impact: Raises questions about the legality and ethical implications of prediction markets in news and finance.
